name: Squid native access log
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/squid (Apache-2.0), entry SQUID3. The native access.log format is a fixed nine-field whitespace-separated record (see Squid docs 'Squid Log Files'); we inline %{NUMBER}, %{INT}, %{IP}, %{WORD}, %{NOTSPACE} macros to plain PCRE2.
